title: slackia geonomiformis
intro: Slackia geonomiformis is a species of bacteria commonly found in the human gut, which has been isolated from the geophyte plant Geogintonia geonomiformis. The plant itself is not well-documented, however, it is believed to have medicinal properties due to the presence of Slackia geonomiformis bacteria. The bacteria have been shown to have prebiotic properties, promoting the growth of beneficial bacteria in the gut, which can lead to various health benefits, including improved digestion and boosted immune system. Slackia geonomiformis bacteria can be prepared as a probiotic supplement, and are also found in fermented foods, such as yogurt and kefir.
